//: SPA fallback: the xApp is a single-page React app. Any unknown path
rewrites to / so client-side routing (if added later) works. The OTT
query string survives the rewrite — Vercel preserves ?xAppToken=... .
- /assets/*  gets aggressive immutable caching (Vite hashes filenames)
- index.html gets no-cache so new deploys are picked up instantly
- CSP allows only what the xApp actually needs: the xumm.app CDN for
the SDK script, the backend API origin for fetch, and Xaman's
WebView bridge (which uses the page itself, no extra origin).
- frame-ancestors 'none' — Xaman is a native WebView, not an iframe,
so blocking frame embedding is safe and closes one clickjacking vector.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://xumm.app; connect-src 'self' https://api.dnsofmoney.com https://xumm.app; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'
